title: Common API Functions
text: Common API Functions Javascript in Uniface makes use of several common API functions. Related Links clearProperties() Restores the initial widget properties of the Uniface data object. clearProperty() Restores the initial value of the specified property. getDSPInstance Returns a reference to the uniface.Instance object that contains the current object. Deprecated. getEntities() Returns an array of uniface.Entity objects contained by the current object, or by the main instance. getEntity() Get the named entity in the specified occurrence or component instance, or the main instance. getInstance() Returns a reference to the uniface.Instance object that contains the current object. getName() Returns the fully qualified name of the current Uniface JavaScript object. getParent() Returns an Uniface JavaScript object that represents the parent of the current object. getProperties() Returns the properties of this Uniface data object. getProperty() Returns the value of a property of this Uniface data object. getShortName() Returns the unqualified name of the current Uniface JavaScript object. getType() Returns a constant string denoting the object type. isEqualTo() Indicates whether the current Uniface JavaScript object equals another JavaScript object, meaning that they both represent the same Uniface object. setProperties() Sets widget properties for a Uniface data object in JavaScript. setProperty() Sets the specified widget property to a given value.
